name: vibe-to-agentic-framework
tagline: Explains the pedagogical narrative arc — vibe coding to agentic engineering — behind every slide and level in the presentation.
verdict: Well-structured conceptual guide: a clear level table, a concrete TodoApp before/after example, and explicit criteria for deciding where new slide content belongs. Dispatch is weak — description explains content but not when to use it, and there is no negative-trigger guidance. No versioning signal.

highlights.summary: description (line 3) explains the framework's content but never says when an agent should invoke it.
No exclusions or 'NOT for' guidance; could misfire against presentation-structure or presentation-styling skills.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes present.
